properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seasons may come and go Life passes quickly by Constantly face with change Come sunshine or winter snow Though we may laugh or cry Jesus, You stay the same.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If I'm resting or at war And Jesus I'll be grateful If I'm rich or if I'm poor And Jesus, I will thank You, If I'm suffering or at peace For You and You alone I live and breathe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: People will come and go I'll have to say goodbye Sometimes our world through pain But meanwhile my faith will grow With thee even flow of time Still You remain the same

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will be joyful for You are my God And joy is the essence of You I'll trust You completely no matter the cost For You are the essence of truth.
